summary: Fixed the dead code issue where process_invoice_through_template() was defined but never called. Wired template-based processing into process_invoice_workflow() by adding a WorkflowTemplateRepository generic parameter to WorkflowService and a with_templates() constructor. The modified process_invoice_workflow() now checks for a default template first, delegates to process_invoice_through_template() if one exists, and falls through to flat rule iteration if no template matches or all stages complete. Added 5 integration tests covering all scenarios. All 105 billforge-core tests pass.
decisions_made: Added TR generic param to WorkflowService rather than changing existing call sites. The WorkflowEngine in invoice-processing crate already had its own template wiring - this fix targets the WorkflowService in core which was missing it.
Used Optional<TR> pattern (template_repo: Option<TR>) so existing new() constructor still works for backward compat, and with_templates() provides the template-aware path.
next_steps: Verify full backend build compiles: SQLX_OFFLINE=true cargo build
Run full test suite to confirm no regressions
